headline: PPL Corporation Trades Above 50 & 200-Day SMAs: How to Play the Stock?
summary: PPL trades above its 50 and 200-day SMAs as data center demand, a $23B infrastructure plan and ongoing cost cuts support growth and margin expansion.

headline: Is PPL Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
summary: As PPL has outperformed the S&P 500 Index on a YTD basis, analysts are bullish about the stock’s prospects.

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on PPL, Raises Price Target to $42
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains PPL (NYSE:PPL) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $41 to $42.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on PPL, Raises Price Target to $40
summary: Mizuho  analyst Anthony Crowdell   maintains PPL (NYSE:PPL) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $39 to $40.
